requirement_topic.en: KC EMC, Radio and Smart-Charging Interfaces
requirement_topic.zh: KC 电磁兼容、无线及智能充电接口
requirement_topic.zht: KC 電磁相容、無線及智能充電接口

summary.en: Korea-market EV chargers may need KC-related EMC and, where wireless functions are present, radio conformity review in addition to electrical safety. Smart chargers also need Korea-compatible backend, communications, cybersecurity, firmware update, payment and data interfaces when deployed in public or managed charging networks.
summary.zh: 韩国市场电动汽车充电桩除电气安全外，可能还需要 KC 相关电磁兼容审查；如具备无线功能，还需无线电合规审查。智能充电桩在公共或受管理充电网络中部署时，还需要兼容韩国后台、通信、网络安全、固件更新、支付和数据接口。
summary.zht: 韓國市場電動汽車充電樁除電氣安全外，可能還需要 KC 相關電磁相容審查；如具備無線功能，還需無線電合規審查。智能充電樁在公共或受管理充電網絡中部署時，還需要相容韓國後台、通訊、網絡安全、韌體更新、支付和數據接口。

standards_or_laws: Korean KC EMC requirements for electrical and electronic equipment
Korean radio conformity requirements where Wi-Fi, cellular, Bluetooth or other wireless modules are included
Korean public charging network communications and data requirements

summary.en: China-market chargers may have CCC, SRRC radio, China RoHS, platform, payment and GB/T communication documentation. These documents do not automatically demonstrate Korean EMC, radio or network-interface compliance.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩可能具备 CCC、SRRC 无线电、中国 RoHS、平台、支付和 GB/T 通信文件。上述文件不会自动证明韩国电磁兼容、无线电或网络接口合规。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁可能具備 CCC、SRRC 無線電、中國 RoHS、平台、支付和 GB/T 通訊文件。上述文件不會自動證明韓國電磁相容、無線電或網絡接口合規。

gap.en: Wireless modules, cellular modems and smart-charging controllers should be reviewed as separate Korean compliance items. Reusing a China cloud, payment flow or SIM configuration can create Korean data, payment, uptime and support gaps. The compliance file should map each radio module, EMC test report, network protocol, backend endpoint and firmware update path to Korea-specific requirements.
gap.zh: 无线模块、蜂窝调制解调器和智能充电控制器应作为单独的韩国合规项目进行审查。复用中国云平台、支付流程或 SIM 配置可能产生韩国数据、支付、在线率和支持差距。合规文件应将每个无线模块、电磁兼容测试报告、网络协议、后台端点及固件更新路径映射到韩国具体要求。
gap.zht: 無線模組、蜂窩調製解調器和智能充電控制器應作為單獨的韓國合規項目進行審查。複用中國雲平台、支付流程或 SIM 配置可能產生韓國數據、支付、在線率和支援差距。合規文件應將每個無線模組、電磁相容測試報告、網絡協議、後台端點及韌體更新路徑映射到韓國具體要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Korean EMC or radio rules apply; smart-network requirements depend on public, subsidised, managed-network or operator conditions.
mandatory_status.cn: China EMC, SRRC or platform approvals do not replace Korean KC EMC/radio and network requirements.

source.publisher: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (KATS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EMC, radio modules and smart-network functions as Korea-specific workstreams. China-market radio, cloud or payment readiness does not automatically satisfy Korean KC or charging-network expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将电磁兼容、无线模块和智能网络功能作为韩国专项工作流处理。中国市场无线、云平台或支付准备状态不会自动满足韩国 KC 或充电网络要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將電磁相容、無線模組和智能網絡功能作為韓國專項工作流處理。中國市場無線、雲平台或支付準備狀態不會自動滿足韓國 KC 或充電網絡要求。
